description: How time-sensitive is acting on this decision? Does delay block other work?
Must act within 24h — blocks other work or has a hard deadline.
Should act within the current sprint — soft deadline, no immediate blocker.
Can defer to a future sprint without consequence.
How significant is the consequence of choosing wrong? Is the decision reversible?
Wrong choice causes irreversible harm or major rework across multiple projects.
Wrong choice causes significant rework in one project but is recoverable.
Wrong choice causes minor rework or can be corrected without large cost.
Easily reversed; minimal downstream effect either way.
What level of human involvement is required to act on this decision?
Agent can execute without any human confirmation. No notification required.
Agent can execute but must notify the operator after the fact.
Agent must halt and wait for explicit operator approval before proceeding.
What kind of action is being recommended?
Build the described capability or fix now.
Inspect the described item and form a decision before acting.
Intentionally postpone — add to backlog with rationale.
Active blocker: halt dependent work until this is resolved.
